title: SIFTA organ event row (base v1)
description: Canonical envelope for append-only organ JSONL rows. Optional top-level "schema" may be set to ORGAN_EVENT_V1 for explicit versioning. The truth_continuity ledger uses a separate frozen shape (TRUTH_CONTINUITY_EVENT_V1 in swarm_truth_continuity.py) until Architect GO to unify.

schema.description: Optional explicit marker for new writers.

ts.description: Unix epoch seconds (float allowed for sub-second ordering).

trace_id.description: Unique per event; UUID4 string recommended.

homeworld_serial.description: Node silicon anchor from owner_silicon() or covenant serial.

organ.description: Logical organ id, e.g. td_learner, octopus, owner_body.

event_type.description: Verb-like category: update, reward, episode, state_change, score, ...

payload.description: Organ-specific factual fields only; keep small.

truth_label.description: ARCHITECT_DOCTRINE reserved for rows that state doctrine or non-measured claims explicitly.
